question.text: How frequently must comprehensive cyber audits be conducted at an RTA?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI mandates comprehensive cyber audits at least twice a year (semi-annually) for RTAs. This frequency ensures any emerging vulnerabilities are identified and addressed promptly. **The Trap:** This is separate from the annual systems audit. Cyber audits focus specifically on cyber security posture and must happen twice per year, while systems audits are annual. **Cross-Exam Context:** The hierarchy is: quarterly DR drills, semi-annual cyber audits, annual systems audits. Each has a different scope and frequency. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Multiple audit layers mean the RTA's systems are continuously evaluated. When clients ask about data security, you can confidently explain that RTAs undergo the most rigorous technology audits mandated by SEBI.
